name: Shiro Shinjo
text: Reaction: After you collect fate during the dynasty phase, choose an opponent and bow this stronghold – gain 1 fate for each faceup non-stronghold province controlled by that player.

name: Khan's Ordu
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – if the current conflict is [pol], switch the conflict type. Each conflict declared this phase is [mil] instead of its normal type.

name: Support of the Unicorn
text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on  clan cards.

name: Wild Stallion
text:
No attachments.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is not participating, choose up to 1 other character you control – move this character and that character to the conflict.

name: Young Warrior
text: This character must be declared as an attacker or defender on the first conflict declared each round.

name: Shinjo Trailblazer
text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict – this character gets +2 [mil] and +2 [pol] until the end of the conflict.

name: Iuchi Farseer
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose an opponent's facedown province – reveal that province.

name: Saadiyah al-Mozedu
text:
Sincerity.
Action: Discard a card from your hand and choose an unbroken province not currently being attacked – turn that province facedown.

name: Iuchi Daiyu
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character – that character gets +1[mil] until the end of the conflict for each faceup non-stronghold province your opponent controls.

name: Moto Chagatai
text: This character does not bow during the conflict resolution of conflicts in which a province your opponent controls was broken.

name: Aranat
text:
No attachments.
Reaction: After you play this character, choose an opponent – that player may reveal any number of his or her facedown non-stronghold provinces. Then, place 1 fate on this character for each facedown province that player controls (including their stronghold province).

name: Hida Tsuru
text: Reaction: After a character is moved to or played into a conflict in which this character is participating – until the end of the conflict, this character gets +1[mil] and +1[pol]. (Unlimited.)

name: Kakita Ryoku
text: Reaction: After a phase begins, if you have the Imperial Favor, choose a character – honor that character.

name: Agasha Taiko
text: Reaction: After you play this character, choose a non-stronghold province – that province cannot be attacked this round.

name: Kaito Nobukai
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, sacrifice this character – bow each participating character. Characters cannot be moved to this conflict.

name: Shosuro Hyobu
text: Action: After an opponent discards 1 or more cards from his or her hand due to the cost or effect of a card ability, choose a character – dishonor that character.

name: Ivory Kingdoms Unicorn
text:
No attachments.
Reaction: After the resolution of a conflict in which this character was attacking, if a province was broken in the conflict – immediately declare your next conflict for the phase. That conflict is [mil] instead of its normal type.

name: Visiting Advisor
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose up to 1 other character you control – move this character and that character home.

name: Shinomen Wayfinders
text:
No attachments except Weapon
Action: During a conflict, reduce the cost to play this character by 1 for each participating  character you control.

name: Curved Blade
text:
Attach to a  character. Restricted.
While attached character is attacking, it gets an additional +2[mil].

name: Ring of Binding
text: During the fate phase, if you are the first player, attached character cannot lose fate or be discarded.

name: Utaku Battle Steed
text:
Attach to a  character.
Attached character gains the Cavalry trait.
Reaction: After the attached character wins a [mil] conflict – honor attached character.

name: Speak to the Heart
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a  character – that character gets +1[pol] until the end of the conflict for each faceup non-stronghold province your opponent controls. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Spoils of War
text: Reaction: After you win a [mil] conflict as the attacker – draw 3 cards. Then, choose and discard 1 card from your hand. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Warriors of the Wind
text: Action: During a conflict – move each participating Cavalry character you control home. Then, choose any number of Cavalry characters you control and move them to the conflict.

name: Ikoma Anakazu
text: During each conflict in which this character is participating, it gets +3 [mil] and +3 [pol] if your opponent has broken one or more of your provinces this phase.

name: Compass
text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict in which attached character is participating – look at the top 3 cards of one of your decks. You may put any number of those cards on the bottom of that deck and the rest on top in any order.

name: Trading on the Sand Road
text: Interrupt: When the draw phase would begin – skip the draw phase. Each player removes the top 4 cards of his or her conflict deck from the game. Until the end of the round, either player may play the removed cards as if they were in his or her hand.
